title: carex lenticularis var. lipocarpa
intro: Carex lenticularis var. lipocarpa, also known as Lipocarpa sedge, is a type of flowering plant in the sedge family (Cyperaceae) that is native to the Pacific Northwest region of North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Carex lenticularis var. lipocarpa include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of this plant typically involve making a decoction or infusion from the roots or rhizomes, which can be used to treat a variety of health issues.
